core_identity.content: CYR3NT is a melodic techno project built on tension between machine precision and human longing.

musical_identity.content: Driving 122-126 BPM melodic techno: analog bass, wide pads, restrained percussion, one memorable motif per track.

differentiation_hypothesis.content: Where peers chase festival maximalism, CYR3NT commits to narrative restraint: every release tells one story arc.

artist_personality.content: Reserved, precise, quietly intense; lets the work speak and answers questions with specifics, never hype.

brand_voice.content: Short declarative sentences. Technical honesty. No exclamation marks, no slang, no manufactured urgency.

audience_hypothesis.content: Listeners 22-38 who favor Afterlife and Anjunadeep catalogs, discover via curated playlists and live sets.

visual_direction.content: Monochrome with a single cyan accent; architectural photography; motion kept slow and deliberate.

narrative_themes.content: Signal versus noise; building alone at night; the moment a pattern finally resolves into meaning.

do_and_avoid.content: Do: process detail, gear honesty, finished work. Avoid: giveaways, engagement bait, genre-bashing, politics.
